'''Adonar Dellox''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Chief Technician]] at [[Reginard Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reginard]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was one of the commanding officers of the base and was known to be a determined man who preferred to work alone. This did not stop him having a relationship with his fellow technician [[Kim Yeasson]], although this relationship ended a month before his [[Death/Legends|death]]. While he was working on the passive sensor array to be deployed on the other side of Reginard, he discovered an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] device which had been planted there by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Tanya Madera]]. This caused Madera to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] him with her [[Needler/Legends|needler pistol]] which contained the deadly [[triflexia]] [[virus]].
